name: matter-expert-skill-creator
description: Build installable expert Claude Code skills from a folder of documents (PDF, DOCX, HTML, markdown) plus optional URLs — produces a typed-link Obsidian-style knowledge vault with cited answers.

plugins.name: docs-to-skill
plugins.description: Turn folders of documents into standalone Claude Code expert skills. Runs a 5-phase pipeline (Ingest → Transform → Link → QA → Emit). Supports two modes: subscription-native (bundled subagents — no API key required) and API-direct (uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).
